top_signals.title: Google I/O primer: Alphabet's AI showcase is its chance to wow Wall Street
top_signals.summary: After a 140% stock surge and a sweeping Wall Street reset, Google’s developer conference has to prove the AI story is more than a market narrative.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
